mapper.select: select e.emp_email, e.emp_pass, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, a.aut_name, ep.pos_name, c.com_name, e.com_id, e.emp_id, e.dept_id, e.pos_id from emp_auth ea join employee e on e.emp_id = ea.emp_id join authority a on a.aut_id = ea.aut_id join emp_position ep on ep.pos_id = e.pos_id join company c on c.com_id = e.com_id where e.emp_email = #{username}

select a.com_id, a.aut_id, a.aut_name, count(ea.emp_aut_id) as aut_count from emp_auth ea right join authority a on ea.aut_id = a.aut_id where a.com_id = #{comId} group by a.com_id, a.aut_id, a.aut_name

select e.emp_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, e.pos_id, p.pos_name, e.com_id, ea.emp_aut_id, a.aut_id, a.aut_name from emp_auth ea join employee e on e.emp_id = ea.emp_id join authority a on a.aut_id = ea.aut_id join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id join department d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where ea.aut_id = #{autId} and e.com_id = #{comId}

select e.emp_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, e.pos_id, p.pos_name, e.com_id, ea.emp_aut_id, a.aut_id, a.aut_name from emp_auth ea join employee e on e.emp_id = ea.emp_id join authority a on a.aut_id = ea.aut_id join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id join department d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where ea.emp_id = #{empId} and e.com_id = #{comId}
